race.comment: FOREVER JEUNE (7) had little luck from a wide alley at Geelong 17 days ago, settling near the tail before making late ground to finish fifth. She was second there fresh up, and the slight rise in trip for her peak run looks ideal. She can have the last say this time. LI'L MISS DRAMA (10) has continued to build her form with a fighting second at Swan Hill 2 weeks ago, travelling prominently throughout, and she was only narrowly denied. With conditions to suit, she looks a leading contender again. EGERTON REEF (2) has been below his best in 2 runs this campaign, but gets an opportunity to improve in this modest company. A better showing would not surprise, so include in all combos. ALL THE MOVES (1) resumes with the blinkers off from a new stable. Let the market be the best guide.
